title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: Alicia Berenson appears to have a perfect life until she shoots her husband and then never speaks another word. Theo Faber, a criminal psychotherapist, becomes obsessed with uncovering the truth behind her silenceâ€”no matter the cost.

title: Gone Girl
author: Gillian Flynn
description: On their fifth wedding anniversary, Amy Dunne disappears, and her husband Nick becomes the prime suspect. As secrets unravel, the truth behind their marriage proves far darker than anyone imagined.

title: The Girl on the Train
author: Paula Hawkins
description: Rachel watches a seemingly perfect couple from her daily train rideâ€”until she witnesses something shocking. Soon, she is drawn into a missing person investigation that blurs the line between truth and illusion.

title: Big Little Lies
author: Liane Moriarty
description: Three women with seemingly perfect lives are brought together by a shocking death at a school trivia night. As secrets and lies surface, the truth behind the crime slowly comes into focus.

title: The Da Vinci Code
author: Dan Brown
description: A murder inside the Louvre Museum sets off a race against time. Symbologist Robert Langdon uncovers a series of cryptic clues that lead to a secret capable of shaking the foundations of history.
